scripts.local:create: STACK_NAME=$(./scripts/stack-name.sh) && pulumi stack init $STACK_NAME && pulumi config env add emotes-service/local-dev -s $STACK_NAME --yes && pulumi config set app:stage $STACK_NAME -s $STACK_NAME
scripts.local:destroy: STACK_NAME=$(./scripts/stack-name.sh) && pulumi destroy -s $STACK_NAME --yes && pulumi stack rm $STACK_NAME --yes
